characters.name: Alex
characters.description: AlexOccupationFootball FanAffiliationAFC Richmond(fan)Physical descriptionGenderMaleSeries informationPortrayed byJay McDonaldFirst appearanceThe Hope That Kills YouAlexwas a minor character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso, and afootballfan who supportsAFC Richmond. He was there at the crucial game for Richmond'srelegationbattle, between Richmond andManchester City F.C.. Alex was devastated to see Richmond succumb to a last-minute winner by City, assisted by former Richmond playerJamie Tartt, relegating Richmond to theChampionship.

characters.name: Armando
characters.description: ArmandoOccupationFootballerAffiliationWest Ham United F.C.At AFC RichmondPositionStrikerNumber10Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'10Hair colorBlackEye colorBrownSeries informationPortrayed bySam Peter CoxFirst appearanceSmells Like Mean SpiritLast appearanceBig Week Armandois a minor recurring character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso, and a football player forWest Ham United F.C.. Armando is a striker for West Ham United, his number is 10 just likeZavafromAFC Richmond. West Ham is owned byRupert Mannionafter he bought it and then he hiredNathan Shelleyas the head coach and manager of the club. Nate is a very strict coach and likes to berate his players, even calling them dumb.

characters.name: Babatunde
characters.description: BabatundeOccupationFootballerAffiliationAFC RichmondAt AFC RichmondPositionCenter-backNumber18Biographical informationDate of birthJune 8, 1992Place of birthBenin City, NigeriaPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight6'4Hair colorBaldEye colorDark BrownSeries informationPortrayed byUgochukwu EjiegbuFirst appearancePilotLatest appearanceSunflowersBabatundeis a minor recurring character featured in theApple TV+show,Ted Lasso,and a football player forAFC Richmond. He is seen with other team members and even participates in group activities such as karaoke and dancing in clubs. He usually hang out with other players such asKyle McCracken,Robbie Roberts,Declan Cockburn,Moe Bumbercatch,Thierry Zoreaux,Tommy Winchester,Gareth Canterbury,Paul Reynolds,Jan Maas, andIsaac McAdoo. Several actors have played the role throughout the two seasons. When the team celebratesSam Obisanya's birthday in the locker room, Babatunde gifted him a framed picture of Nigerian atheletes which makes Sam happy.

Richmond Premier Breeding Pony Company She attends the10th Annual Benefit for Underprivileged Childrenand is looking forward to the auction where she can bid to spend the night with one of theAFC Richmondplayers. She is most looking forward to spending a night withJamie Tarttespecially after seeing him cleaning his chest from food, as he only wearing a suit without a shirt.

characters.name: Baz
characters.description: Basil PrimroseAliasesBazOccupationFootball FanPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'5Hair colorBlackSeries informationPortrayed byAdam ColborneFirst appearancePilotLatest appearanceInverting the Pyramid of SuccessBasil "Baz" Primroseis a recurring character featured in theApple TV+show,Ted Lasso. Baz is a die-hardAFC Richmondfan who watches the matches inThe Crown & Anchorwith his friendsJeremyandPaul. He is the shortest member of the group but the loudest, as he always screams at the television especially during a match. When they announced thatTed LassoandCoach Beardare coming to England from USA to train AFC Richmond, everyone voices their objection against the American coaches, especially when they watch Ted's interview about how much he doesn't know anything about football. At first, he really hates Ted and calls him a 'twat' because he thinks the American coach is trying to ruin his favorite team, and he always express his opinions about the coach, even at the man himself. When he yells and curses at Ted, he seesMichelle LassoandHenry Lassovisiting to the pub so he immediately backtracks the insults and smiles widely, but she tells Baz that she's used to be yelled at as a coach's wife.

characters.name: Coach Beard
characters.description: Coach BeardOccupationAssistant CoachAffiliationWichita State ShockersAFC RichmondFormer clubsWichita State Shockers (NCAA Division I-AA)Biographical informationMarital statusJane Payne(wife)Date of birth1972Place of birthPeoria, IllinoisPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5' 11"Hair colorDirty RedEye colorDark BrownSeries informationPortrayed byBrendan HuntFirst appearancePilotLatest appearanceSo Long, FarewellCoach Willis Beardis a main regular character featured in theApple TV+show,Ted Lasso,one of the coach assistants forAFC Richmond, andTed Lasso's long time assistant slash best friend. In the season two premiere,Goodbye Earl, his first name is revealed as "Willis". AFC Richmond Coach Beard or Beard is an intelligent and a cultured person as he reads a lot of books and novels. He knows more about British Football, the jargons, the languages, UK Cultures, and many things compare to his best friend, Ted. He is a laid back person, very observant, and generally keep it to himself. He usually wears a trucker hat everyday and wears a beret during a special occasion.

characters.name: Bex
characters.description: BexAliasesRebeccaRelativesDiane (daughter)AffiliationAFC Richmond(former shareholder)West Ham United F.C.(wife of the owner)Former clubsAFC RichmondBiographical informationMarital statusRupert Mannion(Ex-husband)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight5'6Hair colorBlondeEye colorBlueSeries informationPortrayed byKeeley HazellFirst appearanceFor the ChildrenLatest appearanceNo Weddings and a FuneralBexis a recurring character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso. She is the new girlfriend later wife ofRupert Mannion, the former owner ofAFC Richmondand the current owner ofWest Ham United F.C.. Her real name is Rebecca, but the media and Rupert calls her Bex. West Ham United F.C.(wife of the owner) During a press conference,Ernie Lounds, a reporter forThe SunasksRebecca Welton, whom he wrongly refers to as "RebeccaMannion", what her thoughts are on her husband seeing another woman who revealed to be Bex. She responds by saying that her ex-husband can see whoever he wants now they are not together. Ernie trying to bait her by mentioning that Rupert was already having an affair with the woman even when Rebecca was still married to him.

characters.name: Gareth Canterbury
characters.description: Gareth CanterburyAliasesGazOccupationFootballerAffiliationAFC RichmondFormer clubsSlough TownAt AFC RichmondPositionLeft BackNumber3Biographical informationDate of birth1991 or 1992Place of birthEnglandPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight6'3Hair colorBlackEye colorDark BrownSeries informationPortrayed byFlaureseFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceThe Hope That Kills YouGareth Canterburywas a recurring character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso, and a Left Back player forAFC Richmond. He was usually seen along with other team members and even participated in group activities such as karaoke and dancing in clubs. He played for one season and then his position is replaced byBabatunde. He suggested "Dirty Martini" as one of the elaborate set pieces during theTrick playsmeeting,Ted Lassocommented that he wanted to run that play three times just for the heck of it. Gareth was a fast runner as he was shown to chase afterJamie Tarttin a match, but Jamie was faster.

characters.name: Cindy Clawford
characters.description: Cindy ClawfordBiographical informationDate of birth2000Date of deathSeptember 2020Place of deathRichmond upon ThamesPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleSeries informationFirst appearanceTan Lines(mentioned)Last appearanceCarol of the Bells(pictured)Cindy Clawfordwas a minor character mentioned in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso. She was a 20-year-old cat that was owned byLeslie Higginsand his family. Higgins mentioned her for the first time whenTed Lassoasked him about his family. Higgins said that he andJulie Higginshave been married for almost 30 years, and they have five childrenLindsay Higgins,Kris Higgins,Dana Higgins,Steve Higgins,Terry Higgins, three dogs, a female cat whose impending death would wreck him emotionally, and a small house. Somewhere between August and September 2020, the cat passed away.

characters.name: Coach Armada
characters.description: Coach ArmadaOccupationAssistant CoachAffiliationAFC RichmondPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'9Hair colorBrownSeries informationPortrayed byNathan John CarterFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceSo Long, Farewell Coach Armadais a minor  recurring character featured in theApple TV+show,Ted Lasso. He is an assistant coach for theAFC Richmondand a part of coaching staff along withCoach Tony,Nathan Shelley,Coach Beard, andRoy Kent. He has been in the club sinceRupert Mannionowned the team andGeorge Cartrickwas the manager of the club. WhenRebecca Weltontakes over the ownership, he stays and keeps doing his job. His first name was never revealed in the show. He is seen with other team members and even participated in group activities such as karaoke and dancing in clubs. He usually hang out with other players and assistants such asKas,Will Kitman, Nate,Trevor, Tony,Kukoč,Martin De Maat,Babatunde, andBhargava.

characters.name: Declan Cockburn
characters.description: Declan CockburnOccupationFootballerAffiliationAFC RichmondAt AFC RichmondPositionForwardNumber19Biographical informationDate of birthSeptember 14, 1994Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'10Hair colorBlackEye colorBlackSeries informationPortrayed byDejon MullingsFirst appearancePilotLatest appearanceSo Long, FarewellDeclan Cockburnis a recurring character featured in theApple TV+show,Ted Lasso,and a Forward player forAFC Richmond. He is seen with other team members and even participates in group activities such as karaoke and dancing in clubs. He usually hang out with other players such asRobbie Roberts,Kyle McCracken,Babatunde,Gareth Canterbury,Tommy Winchester, andMoe Bumbercatch. There is a possibility that Declan is one of the oldest players in the club afterRoy Kentretired. Declan seemed to enjoy watchingJamie TarttbullyingNathan Shelleyespecially in the locker room. He was seen laughing whenever Jamie tormented Nate, picked a fight withRoy Kent, or mockedTed Lasso. His attitude changed after Jamie left the club, but he still laughing whenever someone insults other player. Before the match againstEverton F.C.inLiverpool, Nate roastsColin Hughesin front of other players by calling him a dickhead and criticize him for having a poor defense, and Declan who is sitting next to Colin just laughs.

characters.name: Cam Cole
characters.description: Cam ColeAliasesCameron ColeOccupationSinger, Street Busker, Songwriter, Street PerformerBiographical informationMarital statusSingleDate of birthNovember 20th, 1992Place of birthLondon, EnglandPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'8Hair colorBrownEye colorGreenSeries informationPortrayed byHimselfFirst appearanceBiscuitsLast appearanceFor the ChildrenCam Coleis a minor recurring character of the same name featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso,and a busker/street musician who performs in the streets ofRichmond upon Thames. He is a one-man band or a musician who plays a number of instruments simultaneously using their hands, feet, limbs, and various mechanical or electronic contraptions and he also often sing while he perform. He plays in the corner nearTed Lasso's flat and the coach usually would give him money and listens to his music. After Robbie Williams allegedly pulled out of performing at the10th Annual Benefit for Underprivileged Children,Rebecca WeltonasksLeslie Higginsto find a suitable replacement. During the event, after finding out thatRupert Mannionis the one who sabotaged and cancelledRobbie Williamsto perform, Ted decides to take matters into his own hand, and he grabs Higgins along to recruit Cam for the event.

characters.name: Flo Collins
characters.description: Florence CollinsAliasesFlo, Sassy Smurf, SassyRelativesNora(daughter)OccupationChild PsychologistBiographical informationMarital statusDarren(ex-husband)Place of birthEnglandPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight5'10Hair colorBrunetteEye colorGreenSeries informationPortrayed byEllie TaylorFirst appearanceMake Rebecca Great AgainLatest appearanceSo Long, FarewellFlorence "Flo" Collins, orSassyis a recurring character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso,as the mother ofNora, a child psychologist, andRebecca Welton's "best mate" since a very early age. Florence introduces herself as 'Sassy' to bothKeeley JonesandTed Lassowhen she first meets them. WhenAFC Richmondare playingEverton F.C., inLiverpool, Sassy unexpectedly barges in to Rebecca's hotel suite, effortlessly reviving their friendship after about six years' separation. She calls Rebecca as 'Stinky' — initially as a mean to poisoned the young Rebecca's reputation with their classmates, but they formed a friendship, and the nickname stuck. She immediately falls in with Keeley, who finds her fascinating. She manages to show Keeley sides of Rebecca the former had never suspected existed. One such thing is Rebecca's fairly significant singing voice, which Keeley and the whole of AFC Richmond witnesses during a post-victorykaraokesession. In a brief moment of tough love, Sassy gently deal her friend an honest hand. She lovingly reminds Rebecca that, whileher ex-husbandis indeed terrible, Rebecca had let herself get imprisoned by Rupert's game-playing ways. Before they parted ways, Flo hopes that Rebecca would find a way to resurrect the fun-loving strong woman of their youth — melting away what she described to Keeley as the "old" Rebecca.

characters.name: Flo Collins
characters.description: Florence CollinsAliasesFlo, Sassy Smurf, SassyRelativesNora(daughter)OccupationChild PsychologistBiographical informationMarital statusDarren(ex-husband)Place of birthEnglandPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight5'10Hair colorBrunetteEye colorGreenSeries informationPortrayed byEllie TaylorFirst appearanceMake Rebecca Great AgainLatest appearanceSo Long, FarewellFlorence "Flo" Collins, orSassyis a recurring character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso,as the mother ofNora, a child psychologist, andRebecca Welton's "best mate" since a very early age. Florence introduces herself as 'Sassy' to bothKeeley JonesandTed Lassowhen she first meets them. WhenAFC Richmondare playingEverton F.C., inLiverpool, Sassy unexpectedly barges in to Rebecca's hotel suite, effortlessly reviving their friendship after about six years' separation. She calls Rebecca as 'Stinky' — initially as a mean to poisoned the young Rebecca's reputation with their classmates, but they formed a friendship, and the nickname stuck. She immediately falls in with Keeley, who finds her fascinating. She manages to show Keeley sides of Rebecca the former had never suspected existed. One such thing is Rebecca's fairly significant singing voice, which Keeley and the whole of AFC Richmond witnesses during a post-victorykaraokesession. In a brief moment of tough love, Sassy gently deal her friend an honest hand. She lovingly reminds Rebecca that, whileher ex-husbandis indeed terrible, Rebecca had let herself get imprisoned by Rupert's game-playing ways. Before they parted ways, Flo hopes that Rebecca would find a way to resurrect the fun-loving strong woman of their youth — melting away what she described to Keeley as the "old" Rebecca.

characters.name: Lisa Cramlin
characters.description: Lisa CramlinOccupationSports PunditPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleSeries informationPortrayed byMariia LegunFirst appearanceAll ApologiesLisa Cramlinis an unseen character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso. She is a sports pundit who, alongsideGraham Pull, analysedAFC Richmond'sPremier Leaguedefeat toArsenal F.C.. After a devastating loss against Arsenal,Roy Kentis brooding and bathing in an ice water inside a trash bin in the middle ofTreatment Room. The room is dark while the TV is on as Roy is listening to Lisa and Graham discussing the game. In particular, Roy's performance is especially scrutinized with her highlighting an ignominious own goal that lost the game for Richmond. Ted Lassowalks in and turns on the light to give words of encouragement to Roy because the football player is blaming himself. He sits next to Roy and watches the sports show as the pundits are analyzing the game. She keeps talking about Roy's nine losses while Ted says that Roy was just having a bad day, so it's only a 'Big Whoop'.

characters.name: Trent Crimm
characters.description: Trent CrimmRelativesUnnamed FatherUnnamed DaughterOccupationReporter/AuthorEx-JournalistAffiliationAFC RichmondThe Independent(former)Biographical informationMarital statusDivorcedPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'8Hair colorBrunetteEye colorBrownSeries informationPortrayed byJames LanceFirst appearancePilotLatest appearanceSo long, farewellTrent Crimmis a recurring character in Seasons 1-2 ofTed Lasso, and a main character in Season 3. A sports journalist, he was a reporter forThe Independentnewspaper before leaving his job at the end of the series 2. Unnamed Daughter Ex-Journalist Trent Crimm took his job as a reporter very seriously, and had a reputation for asking piercing questions and writing scathing exposés. He is also aware of how serious the public took football, and at first felt Ted was disrespecting the sport by taking the job as coach. However, he could not help but admire Ted's unrelenting positivity in spite of everyone else's expectations. When his job as a reporter forced him to write an exposé about Ted's panic attack at the FA Cup match, his personal respect for Ted led him to not only leak his source but also allow himself to be fired.

characters.name: Alan Curbishley
characters.description: Alan CurbishleyOccupationUK football managerBiographical informationPlace of birthUKPhysical descriptionGenderMaleAlan Curbishleyis a UK football manager who has managed clubs such asWest Ham United F.C.,Birmingham City F.C., andAston Villa F.C.He is a character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso. He expressed interest in managingAFC RichmondalongsideHarry RedknappandTony Pulisand phoned the club to ensure he was considered for managing the club shouldTed Lassohave been removed from his post.

characters.name: Danthony
characters.description: DanthonyOccupationReality Show ContestantAffiliationLust Conquers AllAt AFC RichmondPositionCo-WinnerBiographical informationMarital statusEllie(ex-girlfriend in the show)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'11Hair colorBlackEye colorBrownSeries informationPortrayed byMiguel Gaspar HarichiFirst appearanceGoodbye EarlLast appearanceMan City Danthonyis a minor character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso, a current contestant ofLust Conquers All, a previous winner, and a former boyfriend ofElliefrom the show. Both him and Ellie were co-winners from the previous season. His full name is never mentioned. Danthony is a handsome young man and a contestant of a competitive reality show in Britain. He and Ellie are co-winners from the last season, and they are expected to compete in the show's spinoffLust Conquers All Starswith other winners from previous seasons.

characters.name: Darren
characters.description: DarrenRelativesNora(daughter)Biographical informationMarital statusFlo Collins(ex-wife)Physical descriptionGenderMaleSeries informationFirst appearanceMake Rebecca Great Again(mentioned)Darrenis an unseen minor character in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso,Flo Collins' ex-husband, and isNora's father. He divorced Flo a.k.a Sassy and metRebecca Weltonat a party where he told her about the divorce, and also proceeded to hit on Rebecca. Sassy mentions that her ex-husband used to self-pleasure while watchingKeeley Jones's commercials or television appearances, basically admitting that he was an unpleasant man. After the divorce with Darren, Flo is now happy and interested in meeting other men.

characters.name: Jack Dawkins
characters.description: Jack DawkinsAliasesDieselOccupationFootballerAffiliationAFC RichmondAt AFC RichmondPositionCenter MidfieldNumber15Biographical informationDate of birth1994Place of birthEnglandPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'11Weight76 kgHair colorLight BrownEye colorBrownSeries informationPortrayed byReece ThomasFirst appearancePilotLatest appearanceInverting the Pyramid of SuccessJack Dawkinswas a recurring character featured in theApple TV+show,Ted Lasso,and a Center Midfield player forAFC Richmond. He was seen with other team members and even participates in group activities such as karaoke and dancing in clubs. He usually hung out with other players such asKukoč,O'Brien,Gareth Canterbury,Tommy Winchester,Robbie Roberts,Anders Rosenfeldt,Martin De Maat, andTyler Shannon. Jack is a tall man and has middle-length hair that he usually tied into a man-bun. During a match againstManchester City F.C., their CaptainIsaac McAdootold everyone to do the 'Lasso Special' in which he positioned himself as an Offensive Guard on the far right side.

characters.name: Martin De Maat
characters.description: Martin De MaatOccupationFootballerAffiliationAFC RichmondFormer clubsAjaxAt AFC RichmondPositionGoalkeeperNumber22Biographical informationMarital statusSinglePlace of birthNetherlandsPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorDark BrownSeries informationPortrayed byJoshua OteroFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceSo Long, Farewell(locker sighting)Martin De Maatis a minor recurring and also an unseen character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso, and a goalkeeper forAFC Richmond. He usually seen along with other team members and even participates in group activities such as karaoke and dancing in clubs. He played for one season and his position was mostly replaced byThierry Zoreaux. He left afterJamie Tarttreturned to the club, but returned in season three along withAnders Rosenfeldt. During the 'ghost cleansing' ceremony at their locker room, he throws a pair of lacy underwear to the bin before they take it out and sets it on fire outside.

characters.name: Deborah
characters.description: DeborahAliasesMotherRelativesRebecca Welton(Daughter)Paul Welton (Husband, deceased)OccupationHousewifeBiographical informationMarital statusWidowPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHair colorStrawberry BlondeSeries informationPortrayed byHarriet WalterFirst appearanceThe SignalLatest appearanceNo Weddings and a FuneralDeborahis a recurring character in theApple TV+seriesTed LassoandRebecca Welton's mother. Paul Welton (Husband, deceased) Deborah appears suddenly in Rebecca's home kitchen in the morning, discovers a nakedLuca, and immediately announces that she has left her husband, Paul. During lunch with Rebecca,Keeley JonesandTed Lasso, she explains the reason why she left her husband is that she needs to take control of her life after being disrespected by her husband. Rebecca is not too concerned about this split as her parents have fallen into a habit of separating every few years, and usually, within two weeks her father would buy an expensive environmentally sound gift, apologize, and then they reunite.

characters.name: Denise
characters.description: DeniseOccupationReality Show ContestantAffiliationLust Conquers AllBiographical informationMarital statusSinglePhysical descriptionGenderFemaleSeries informationFirst appearanceLavender(mentioned) Denisewas an unseen minor character featured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso,and a former contestant ofLust Conquers All. She only mentioned in the show once asJamie Tartt's former lover. Urimentioned her when Jamie went to see him in the agency office, asking for a career advice, but the agent told him that due to his manipulative ways, with a liability for acting like an asshole, and disappeared onMan City, not to mention cheated onAmywith her by having a jacuzzi sex in the show, nobody wanted him to join any show or football clubs.

characters.name: Diamond Dogs
characters.description: The Diamond DogsOccupationCoaches, Director of CommunicationAffiliationAFC RichmondPhysical descriptionGenderMalesSeries informationFirst appearanceThe Diamond DogsLast appearanceSo Long, Farewell TheDiamond Dogsare a group of people founded byTed Lassofeatured in theApple TV+series,Ted Lasso. The group includes Ted,Coach Beard,Nathan Shelley, andLeslie Higginsas they try to sort out relationship problems within the group but also for the people. Other names for the group included"Ted Lasso's Personal Dilemma Squad", "The E.Q. Warriors", "The Knights of Support",and"The Proud Boys,"which causes Nathan to vomit and everyone else uncomfortable. Nate then suggests the name"The Diamond Dogs"because they are fromAFC Richmondand their mascot is a Greyhound. Everyone agrees with the name, and Higgins howl approvingly.
